title: frontend: Fix Backstage receiver listener leak on Home remount
author: Rohith-Saran

findings.description: Root package-lock.json gains cross-env@10.1.0 and its dependency tree without any corresponding package.json change. frontend/package.json pins cross-env@^7.0.3 — major version mismatch. Appears to be spurious artifact from an unrelated npm install run. Remove these changes or provide a matching package.json update.
PR body says 'Fixes #5775' which is the PR number itself. Branch name is 'bug#5417' suggesting issue #5417 is the intended reference. Update to 'Fixes #5417'.
setupBackstageMessageReceiver correctly returns cleanup function when isBackstage() is true, and no-op otherwise — robust for non-Backstage contexts.
useEffect change is a single-line idiomatic 'return setupBackstageMessageReceiver()' — clean and hard to misread.
